title: Butler Faculty Research Reaches the Global Game
summary_en: A Butler professor’s work is now helping coaches around the world rethink how athletes learn—at every level of the game. Early in his coaching career, Dr. Tom Parry was doing what many coaches are taught to do—running structured drills, breaking skills into parts, focusing on repetition. It was organized. It was efficient. But it wasn’t…
author: Katie Palmer Wharton '14
title_cn: 巴特勒大学运动训练研究成果获国际足联推广 多项办学成果获表彰

title: Justine Starke Named 2026 Recipient of John Henry Weidner Award for Altruism at Butler University
summary_en: Justine Starke, a first-year Strategic Communications major with a minor in English Literature, is the recipient of the 2026 John Henry Weidner Endowed Scholarship for Altruism, presented by the Department of Sociology & Criminology’s Student Sociology & Criminology Association (SSCA), in recognition of her exceptional commitment to service, leadership, and community engagement.  Starke has demons
author: Ashley Hutson
title_cn: 巴特勒大学贾丝廷·斯塔克获评2026年度约翰·亨利·韦德纳利他主义奖

title: Leading with Purpose: Meet Butler’s 2026 Honorary Degree Recipients
summary_en: From the court to the community to the institutions that shape our city, this year’s honorees show what it means to lead—and to leave something stronger behind. Butler University will award honorary degrees to Tamika Catchings, J. Marshall “Marsh” Davis ’80, and Rollin M. “Rollie” Dick (posthumously) during its May 8, 2026, Commencement ceremony. The…
author: Katie Palmer Wharton '14
title_cn: 巴特勒大学公布2026年毕业典礼荣誉学位获得者名单

title: Butler Breaks Ground on Safety and Transit Hub, Advancing Vision for a More Connected Campus and Community
summary_en: With clouds clearing and the sun making a late cameo appearance, Butler University officially broke ground on its new Safety and Transit Hub—marking a significant step forward in the institution’s long-term Gateway Project strategy and its commitment to strengthening both campus operations and community connectivity.  Faculty, staff, trustees, construction partners, and community members gathered
author: Mark Apple
title_cn: 巴特勒大学动工建设安全与交通枢纽 推进校园与社区更紧密互联互通愿景
